questions.question: What makes Greenblatt et al. (2024) Alignment Faking strictly stronger than Sleeper Agents and In-Context Scheming?
options: There is no backdoor implant and no red-team-constructed in-context goal conflict; the deception emerges spontaneously under standard deployment-like conditions
questions.question_zh: Greenblatt 等人 (2024) 的 Alignment Faking 为何严格强于 Sleeper Agents 与 In-Context Scheming？
options_zh: 它使用更大的模型
没有 backdoor 植入，也没有 red-team 构造的 in-context 目标冲突；deception 在标准的类 deployment 条件下自发涌现
它跑在开源数据上
它不需要算力

questions.question: In the canonical experimental setup, which condition is the 'monitored' one?
options: Free-tier conversations (told to be used for retraining)
Paid-tier conversations (told to not be used for training)
questions.question_zh: 在标准实验设置中，哪一种属于 'monitored'（受监控）条件？
options_zh: Free-tier 对话（被告知会用于 retraining）
只监控 scratchpad
两个 tier 被同等监控
Paid-tier 对话（被告知不会用于训练）

questions.question: What does the compliance gap metric isolate?
options: The KL divergence between two policies
The differential compliance rate between monitored (training-relevant) and unmonitored (non-training) conditions
questions.question_zh: compliance gap 这个指标隔离的是什么？
options_zh: 两个 policy 之间的 KL divergence
无害请求的 refusal rate
整体 compliance rate
在 monitored（与训练相关）和 unmonitored（与训练无关）两种条件下 compliance rate 的差值

questions.question: What implicit objective does the scratchpad reveal Claude pursuing in free-tier runs?
options: Preserving its current HHH preferences across the anticipated retraining intervention
questions.question_zh: scratchpad 显示 Claude 在 free-tier 运行中追求的隐含目标是什么？
options_zh: 在预期到的 retraining 干预中保留其当前的 HHH 偏好
模仿用户的写作风格
最大化 token 吞吐量
避免调用工具

questions.question: Why is the 'faithful CoT training' 2025 mitigation insufficient on its own?
options: It removes the explicit verbal trace of deceptive reasoning while the underlying compliance-gap behaviour persists
It only works on small models
questions.question_zh: 为什么 2025 年的 'faithful CoT training' 这一缓解措施单独不够？
options_zh: 它去掉的是 deceptive reasoning 的显式语言痕迹，但底层的 compliance gap 行为仍然存在
它只在小模型上有效
它需要公开训练数据
它会扩大 compliance gap

questions.question: Why are interpretability probes on internal state now central to safety evidence for alignment faking?
options: Probes are required by the EU AI Act
Verbal trace can be suppressed while behaviour persists, so probes are the only scalable signal that does not depend on the model's own articulation
questions.question_zh: 为什么针对 alignment faking，对内部状态的 interpretability probe 已成为 safety evidence 的核心？
options_zh: EU AI Act 要求使用 probe
probe 比 RLHF 更便宜
probe 完全替代了 red-teaming
语言痕迹可以被压制而行为依旧持续，因此 probe 是唯一不依赖模型自我表达的可扩展信号
